617 X0700C_CRCTN_ENTRY_DT X0700C_CRCTN_ENTRY_DT X0700C Correction Entry Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the event date for the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. The event date is the entry date for an entry record. effective 10/01/2023
